display_text: Ocean Heart, Tier Unknown: Provides +5 to all attributes. While in the river, grants 10 HP regeneration and 5 mana regeneration per second. This river-specific regen allows for lane recovery and mana sustain during river skirmishes or while transitioning between lanes. Stats: All Stats: +5, River HP Regen: 10 HP/s, River Mana Regen: 5 MP/s.
